creator: xenophon+freebsd@irtnog.org
text:
OpenID-LDAP is an OpenID identity provider (IdP) that works in concert with an LDAP-based directory service, including OpenLDAP and Active Directory Domain Services.  Installation is fairly simple and detailed in the accompanying README and pkg-message files.

Fix: See attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N/A
